title: London
description: Vibrant, historic, and cosmopolitan capital blending centuries-old tradition with modern innovation.

title: Puerto Rico
description: Tropical island paradise with turquoise waters, colorful colonial towns, and white-sand beaches.

title: Tokyo
description: A dazzling mix of ultra-modern skyscrapers, ancient temples, world-class cuisine, and neon-lit nightlife.

title: Barcelona
description: Sun-drenched Mediterranean gem famous for stunning architecture, lively tapas bars, and golden beaches.

title: Cape Town
description: Breathtaking coastal city nestled between mountains and ocean, offering diverse culture and natural beauty.
